entity.summary: Singapore-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering spot and futures trading. Fairdesk stated that it launched in 2021 and announced in October 2024 that changing market conditions and regulatory changes had led it to permanently close. Trading positions were scheduled to close on 2024-10-17, withdrawals remained available during the wind-down, and final platform closure was set for 2024-11-30.
entity.notes: Launch date is year-level and stored as 2021-01-01 for schema consistency. death_reason is voluntary_shutdown because the operator announced an orderly permanent closure; regulatory change was one stated factor rather than a documented enforcement order. The current redirect or dead-domain state of the original domain is not asserted without a fresh URL verification, so official_url_status remains unknown.

events.title: Fairdesk launched
events.description: Fairdesk's closure announcement described the exchange as officially launched in 2021 and offering spot and futures cryptocurrency trading.
events.notes: Only the year is established by the available operator announcement; 2021-01-01 is a schema-normalized year-level date.

events.title: Fairdesk announced permanent closure
events.description: Fairdesk announced that all futures and spot positions would close on 2024-10-17, that only withdrawals would remain during the wind-down, and that the platform would permanently close on 2024-11-30.
events.notes: The operator cited evolving market conditions and regulatory changes.

events.title: Fairdesk reached its announced final closure date
events.description: Fairdesk's published wind-down schedule set 2024-11-30 as the permanent closure date after a withdrawal-only period.
events.notes: Used as the terminal marker according to the operator's formal closure schedule.

evidence.title: Fairdesk Cryptocurrency Exchange Announces Permanent Closure of Platform by November 30, 2024
evidence.notes: Operator-supplied release identifying the 2021 launch period and exchange activities.

evidence.title: Fairdesk crypto exchange to shut down over regulatory concerns
evidence.notes: Independent report confirming Singapore context, 2021 launch, and closure announcement.

evidence.title: Fairdesk permanent closure release
evidence.notes: Primary operator release for trading-stop, withdrawal-only, and final closure dates.

evidence.title: Fairdesk crypto exchange to shut down over regulatory concerns
evidence.notes: Independent report of the operator's shutdown timeline and stated policy/regulatory factors.

evidence.title: Fairdesk crypto exchange to shut down over regulatory concerns
evidence.notes: Secondary confirmation of the announced final closure date.
